## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.2]
- SonoForge version: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (DICOM files used, server settings, etc.).
